brief: Create an evidence-led seven-slide executive briefing on the 2022 FIFA World Cup for sports-media leadership. Use only these supplied facts: France scored 16 goals, Argentina 15, England 13, and Portugal 12; Kylian Mbappe scored 8, Lionel Messi 7, Julian Alvarez 4, and Olivier Giroud 4; the tournament produced 172 goals in 64 matches, or 2.69 goals per match. Include an editable comparison chart, an editable process diagram explaining how group-stage momentum became knockout resilience, and an editable formula for goals per match. Conclude with three implications for audience engagement. Do not invent sources, images, quotes, or statistics; mark unsupported claims [source needed].
